what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment: an image added to the design-source channel, pointing to image://design-source/company-info/p-05, with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content.
standouts: Uses a URI scheme 'image://' to locate the attached asset.
Attachment ID 'att-89249aea' appears in both the filename and the id field.
conventions: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter metadata.
ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit UTC offset.
concerns: No body description or alt text for the image.
notes: This is a ledger-style attachment record that links the design-source channel to a specific image asset by URI.
questions: Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as an image attachment record and it does exactly that; n/a
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped record that a specific image belongs to the design-source channel.
contribution: Provides a stable, file-local attachment entry that maps a channel to an image asset URI and creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment record for the design-source channel referencing image://design-source/company-info/p-05 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a timestamped link between a channel and an image asset for retrieval and audit.
